title: Tofu Create
description: A mod that connects create mod and tofucraftreload!
body:
![TofuCreate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SNoLi0im/images/065b47c0070e872e106d94eadc44c8cebd2278c4.png)


## Summary

This is a mod that supports automation of tofu and soymilk using tofucraftreload and create mod.

And Even Tofu Gear like Early State

This mod need TofuCraftReload and Create.

![Tofu Metal With Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SNoLi0im/images/b99b8625139320951a9770901d57cafa71fd46ef.png)
 

## Features
Support automation for almost soymilk drink item

using Mechanical Press for press to tofu and make harder

using Spout with nigari and make tofu
